## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run ci` passes (typecheck + lint + tests)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behaviour changes
- [ ] A changeset is included (`bun run changeset`) — or this is docs/CI-only
- [ ] No `node:` imports or Node-only globals added (stays runtime-agnostic)
